description: Concrete adapters/integrations: Doctrine migrations, Mercure publisher, Messenger bus config, storage implementations (in-memory, Doctrine, Flysystem), and Symfony AI bridge.

subNamespaces.description: Doctrine integration — migrations for agent-loop persistence tables (events, commands, runs, outbox, prompt state, artifacts).
Messenger bus configuration — bus name constants for command, execution, and publisher buses.
Mercure integration — publishes RunEvents via Symfony Mercure Hub for real-time streaming.
Storage adapters — in-memory implementations for all store interfaces, Flysystem-based run log writer/reader, Doctrine-based event store, hot prompt state, local artifact store.
Symfony AI bridge — Platform adapter, tool executor adapter, message mapper, stream delta reducer, cancellation token, platform invoker.
